Full all-source coverage gate also passed on the shared dirty tree: 150 files, 3151 tests, 95.46 statements / 88.48 branches / 96.22 functions / 95.70 lines. Still not literal 100%; remaining notable command-core gaps include search.ts projection read branches 1569/1580/1591 plus config/context/contracts/create/list/reindex/schema/test/update residues from the targeted table.

value.text: Wave15 extension-loader evidence: expanded tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts for manifest metadata invalid-shape coverage, denied extension policy registration paths (command override plus parser/preflight/service/renderer/schema/importer/exporter/search), and deeper schema registration validation edge cases. Focused verification passed: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts tests/unit/extensions-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/runtime-registrations.spec.ts tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts (4 files, 213 tests). Targeted coverage probe passed with thresholds disabled and removed .tmp/coverage-wave15-extension; extension slice moved all-files lines 94.48% -> 96.10%, src/core/extensions/loader.ts lines 94.53% -> 98.21%, branches 90.66% -> 94.51%, statements 94.46% -> 98.05%. Residual targeted misses remain mostly in extension.ts lifecycle branches, bundled catalog unavailable-package/legacy fallback paths, install-source npm failure cleanup, doctor helper fallback branches, and loader version/package-read/collision tail branches.

Residual statement misses: 1295, 1312, 1571-1580, 1594, 1615, 2332, 2337, 2440-2445.

value.text: Wave15-runtime evidence: added focused runtime/store coverage in tests/unit/telemetry-runtime.spec.ts and tests/unit/test-runs-command.spec.ts, plus minimal telemetry _testOnly exports for existing pure helpers in src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts. Targeted coverage deltas vs wave14 snapshot: src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts lines 93.27% -> 95.14%, statements 93.07% -> 95.07%, functions 91.07% -> 91.96%, branches 86.15% -> 92.01%; src/core/test/background-runs.ts lines 90.51% -> 97.83%, statements 90.59% -> 97.84%, functions 88.23% -> 98.03%, branches 79.74% -> 86.49%. Residual target misses: telemetry retry/write-failure branches and path/email edge guards; background-runs remaining misses are platform/proc parsing guards plus child-pidless signal path and finished progress branch.

value.text: Gemini review follow-up 4: made pm get child rollups match parent IDs case-insensitively while preserving trimmed status rollups, and replaced the init package-summary inline object filter with a typed non-array package-entry guard. Validation passed: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/get-append-command.spec.ts tests/unit/init-command.spec.ts (2 files / 35 tests), PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 pnpm typecheck, and pnpm changelog:pm:check. The remaining Gemini note against .agents/pm/extensions/pm-changelog/dist/generator.js is package-owned: changelog:pm:check reinstalls published pm-changelog 2026.6.13 and overwrites local artifact edits, so that fix belongs upstream in the pm-changelog repo/version rather than this pm-cli PR.
